description: Multi-platform social media publishing pipeline with preview approval. Activated via --team flag on post or cross-post commands.

agents.name: content-adapter-agent
agents.role: Adapt source content for each target platform's constraints and culture

agents.name: preview-agent
agents.role: Show adapted content side-by-side for user approval before publishing

agents.name: media-handler-agent
agents.role: Upload, resize, and validate media per platform limits

agents.name: publisher-agent
agents.role: Execute late-tool.mjs posts create for each platform

agents.name: monitor-agent
agents.role: Track publish status, retry failures, update Notion DB
